operator_rules: Treat baseline metadata as proposal support, not proof that an IFS route is submit-ready.
Use formal text only with the matching route and only after missing evidence is present.
Do not add partners, facilities, assets, budgets or eligible leads unless the evidence is in the record.
Do not send email, upload, invite, accept terms, submit Project Impact or submit an IFS application from this coverage pass.
